sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Erik - Bash Attack
special_mechanics.description: Erik can bash through some walls and enemies with his helmet

special_mechanics.name: Erik - Running
special_mechanics.description: Erik can run faster than the other two Vikings

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Hang Glider
special_mechanics.description: Olaf can use his shield as a hang glider for descent control

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Platform
special_mechanics.description: Olaf's shield can be used as a platform for other Vikings to walk on and reach higher areas

special_mechanics.name: Baleog - Bow Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Baleog can use bow to hit switches from distance

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantitative physics parameters. No technical physics documentation available in accessible sources. Game features three distinct character abilities that define movement rather than numerical physics values.
sources_used: wikipedia - The Lost Vikings article (gameplay mechanics section)
